questions.question: Consider a singly linked list with a head node containing the data 10 and next pointer pointing to the second node. What is the time complexity of the Insert operation at the beginning of this linked list, assuming the worst-case scenario?

A linked list is represented by a head node with data value 20 and a next pointer to the second node. What is the time complexity of the Delete operation on a linked list with m nodes, if the Delete operation is performed at the beginning of the list?
questions.hint: The number of nodes in the list

questions.question: A doubly linked list is initially empty, and we want to display its contents in ascending order. Which operation would you perform first, and why?
